---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new algorithm, operator, or capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem are you trying to solve? What limitation does the current solver have?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be specific about:
- New CLI flags or behavior
- New crossover/mutation operators
- New input/output formats
- Performance improvements

## Alternatives Considered
What alternative approaches have you considered? Why is your proposal better?

## Implementation Notes
If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here. Include:
- Relevant papers or references
- Pseudocode or algorithm description
- Potential impact on existing tests

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I would need guidance to implement this
- [ ] I am just suggesting the idea
